'''Zarandro Vykas''' was the brother of [[Zardra Vykas]] and a drug addict. He worked as an intergalactic criminal with his sister, traveling the galaxy in her ship, a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] freighter called the [[Firebrand (starship)|''Firebrand'']].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Zarandro was born into a well-to-do family that let him have anything and everything that he wanted. As he grew older, he and his sister Zardra did almost everything together, from sports and taking the same classes to spending their leisure time together. Though he had everything he wanted, Zarandro was bored with his life, his friends, and the parents that supplied his every want. Despite this fact, he and his sister were viewed well by their friends.<ref name="UA" />

However, Zarandro's lifestyle led him to be addicted to [[slumm]], a type of [[Stimulant/Legends|stimulant]], that helped him in sporting events, but had to side effect of leaving him exhausted afterwards. When he realized he was addicted to slumm he went to his [[Unidentified Balosar drug dealer|Balosar drug dealer]] for help instead of his sister or his parents. The [[Balosar (species)/Legends|Balosar]] gave him a form of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] that took care of his addiction to slumm, but left him with a greater addiction to the new drug. With this new drug in his system, Zarandro's reflexes were improved which helped him in his training in martial arts.<ref name="UA" />

===Criminal career===
After he had overcome his addiction to slumm, Zarandro's sister, Zardra, thought of a bold scheme that would give them both a way to overcome the boredom with their lives that they shared. Her plan was to become criminals, traveling from [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to planet on her [[Starship/Legends|starship]] the [[Firebrand (starship)|''Firebrand'']] committing small crimes with little risk to give them some excitement.<ref name="UA" />

The siblings the rushed ahead into the scheme with enthusiasm, traveling the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], and to a lesser degree the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], committing various small crimes along the way. Whenever the duo would enter a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], Zarandro would brag about their latest crime and he would quickly spend whatever money he had gained.<ref name="UA" />

==Personality and traits==
Zarandro Vykas was a man of average height with a rather thin, but athletic, build. He always kept his black hair short and styled in accordance with the latest fashions. His addictions caused him to have pale skin and dark circles around his eyes, and they also caused him to tremble and sweat most of the time.<ref name="UA" />

He usually wore nice, fashionable clothes and walked with the bearing of an important person.
When he and his sister went to a planet to commit a crime, Zarandro would arm himself with only a pair of combat gloves and a small [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]]. Even though he carried a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], he preferred to fight using martial arts, and only used the blaster when he could not reach his opponent with his fists. Even when he did use the blaster, he always used the stun setting, because it was not in his nature to harm anyone permanently.<ref name="UA" />

The only reason Zarandro was a criminal was because of boredom with his life and his desire for excitement. He and his sister did not need money and did not like hurting people, but they did enjoy the thrill, which caused them to be wanted for various crimes by the authorities.<ref name="UA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zarandro's first appearance was in the [[Wizards of the Coast]]'a [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] sourcebook ''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' as one of the named villains in the first chapter of the book.<ref name="UA" />

In ''Ultimate Adversaries'', "spice" was misspelled "spite" in one place but the rest of the section made it clear that it was meant to read "spice".
